name: Andean Silver Limited
analysis: ASL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.0900, stop A$1.6632, target A$2.3200 (0.54:1) — then trail it.
